repair_candidate.summary: Repair the existing #89997 contributor PR branch if the two failing checks are actionable while keeping the patch narrow: mcp serve should be treated as stdout-clean stdio protocol startup so doctor/config diagnostics do not write startup text to stdout before JSON-RPC.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(cli): suppress mcp serve startup stdout
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Repair source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/89997

Summary:
- Keep `openclaw mcp serve` on the stdout-clean startup policy path so startup diagnostics/config warnings do not pollute JSON-RPC stdout.
- Keep the regression coverage focused on the startup policy behavior.
- Preserve credit for @kenners22 as the source contributor; #68800 remains credited historical context for an earlier server-layer attempt.

Validation:
- git diff --check
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cli/command-startup-policy.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
credit_notes: Preserve contributor credit for kenners22 as author of source PR #89997.
